_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of hair shaft progenitors that create a niche for hair pigmentation.

_contextSnippet: in the skin from Scf flox/gfp; K14Cre mice, KIT+ melanocytes were detected only in the lower matrix but were completely absent in the upper HF matrix
details: Successfully distinguished melanocyte populations, showing KIT+ melanocytes present only in lower matrix but completely absent in upper HF matrix in Scf knockout mice
